onboarding.slide1_desc: A brand new, modern, fluent, and personalized reading experience.
onboarding.slide2_desc: When you create an account, your progress is saved to the cloud. Never lose your place even if you change devices.
onboarding.slide3_desc: Listen to verses and share your feelings anonymously with other readers instantly.
